ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT STEVEN GRUEL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEVEN GRUEL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS DENIED. ON AUGUST 26, 2014, PLAINTIFF FILED A PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS SHOWING THAT SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS EFFECTUATED ON DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 415.20(B). THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED BY EMAIL BEFORE HEARING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STEVEN GRUEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is off calendar. A notice of stay was filed on June 9, 2015. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT STEVEN GRUEL's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. On August 26, 2014, Plaintiff filed a proof of service of summons showing that substitute service was effectuated on Defendant pursuant to CCP sec. 415.20(b). The Court signed the order that was submitted by email before hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
